sentences.arabic: كَانَ رَاشِدٌ يُؤَجِّلُ عَمَلَهُ دَائِمًا إِلَى الْغَدِ.
sentences.translation: Rašid je uvijek odgađao posao za sutra.
sentences.translationEn: Rashed always used to postpone his work until tomorrow.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ تَرَاكَمَتِ الأَعْمَالُ وَشَعَرَ بِالضَّغْطِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju su se gomilali poslovi i osjetio je pritisak.
sentences.translationEn: In the end the tasks piled up and he felt pressure.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَبْدَأَ بِعَمَلٍ صَغِيرٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je da svaki dan počne s malim poslom.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to start with a small task every day.

sentences.arabic: الْبِدَايَةُ الصَّغِيرَةُ تَجْعَلُ الْعَمَلَ الْكَبِيرَ أَسْهَلَ.
sentences.translation: Mali početak čini veliki posao lakšim.
sentences.translationEn: A small start makes a big task easier.
